downstream_consumers: LLOYD router (Python; HTTP client via requests; pre-prompt assembly path)

risks.title: Port 52849 collision on developer machine
risks.mitigation: Detect EADDRINUSE and exit 2 with clear message; expose --port flag for override; document in DEPLOY doc.

risks.title: Ollama unreachable mid-stream while server is up
risks.mitigation: Pre-query 2s health probe with 5s cache; 503 envelope with degraded:true; server stays up. Phase 4 explicit.

risks.title: SemanticSearchService not exported from main package index
risks.mitigation: Per Q1 audit: deep-import from src/integration/rag/semantic-search.js. Server lives in same repo so deep-import is in-tree, not consumer-fragile.

risks.title: Long-running search blocks Node event loop
risks.mitigation: All search calls are async; no sync blocking work. Per-request timeout (default 30s) returns 504 if exceeded.

risks.title: Multiple concurrent index requests against same project_dir
risks.mitigation: In-memory mutex per project_dir for /api/rag/index; concurrent index requests against same project return 409 Conflict (other index in progress).

risks.title: JSON body size attack (huge query)
risks.mitigation: Cap request body at 1 MB; return 413 if exceeded.

risks.title: Server exits if Ollama not running at startup
risks.mitigation: Server starts regardless of Ollama state; Ollama probe is per-request lazy. Phase 4 explicit.

risks.title: WO-ROUTER-V1-001 Phase 5 INTEGRATION blocked on this WO
risks.mitigation: This WO is the ship-target. Surface contract early (Phase 5 docs land before Phase 6 deploy) so router can review JSON shape before integrating.

dependencies: @coderef/CODEREF-CORE existing RAG layer (SemanticSearchService, OllamaProvider, SQLiteVectorStore - per Q1 audit, internal, not in main package export but importable in-tree)
Node stdlib http (no new package dep)
Ollama (external system service, default http://localhost:11434, model nomic-embed-text)
public_api_hits: package.json bin map adds coderef-rag-server entry (publicly visible CLI bin)

decision_records.choice: Use Node stdlib http (no Express dep)
decision_records.rationale: localhost-only JSON API with 4 endpoints; stdlib is sufficient and adds zero deps. System-service posture benefits from minimal moving parts.
Reserved by router design doc; matches LLOYD's HTTP-first integration pattern (LLOYD lives on 52847; OllamaBridge talks to 11434; this slot is 52849).

decision_records.choice: Pre-request Ollama health probe with 5s cache (degraded-path)
decision_records.rationale: Per LLOYD D3 spec: Ollama-down should not crash the server; should return 503 with degraded:true. Cache prevents probe-on-every-request overhead.

decision_records.choice: Reuse SemanticSearchService via in-tree deep import
decision_records.rationale: Per Q1 audit: not in main package export, but server lives in same repo so deep-import is acceptable (no consumer-fragility risk).

decision_records.choice: POST /api/rag/index spawns rag-index CLI as subprocess
decision_records.rationale: Reuses existing CLI logic (idempotent + incremental + --rag-reset support). Avoids re-implementing the indexing orchestrator inside the server.

decision_records.choice: In-memory per-project mutex for index requests
decision_records.rationale: R5 mitigation. Two index runs against same project_dir would race writes to .coderef/coderef-vectors.json. Cheap mutex prevents corruption.
Per LLOYD D1 spec: versioned JSON contract. Future breaking changes bump the header value; LLOYD pins on read.

supersedes: DISPATCH-2026-04-25-005 (same WO; -007 supersedes with explicit deliverables)
